title: ITALY enforcement action against Order of Physicians, Surgeons and Dentists of the Province of Macerata (4,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 4,000 on the Order of Physicians, Surgeons and Dentists of the Province of Macerata. During the pandemic, the controller suspended a health professional for failing to fulfil the vaccination requirements. The controller sent the suspension notification...
dedupKey: italy enforcement action against order of physicians surgeons and dentists of the province of macerata 4 000|2026-02-12
